# 1753 SKINCARE

> Swedish skincare brand using CBD and CBG to strengthen skin naturally. Founded by Christopher Genberg. Ships from Sweden to the EU.

## About

1753 SKINCARE makes CBD- and CBG-based skincare that works with the body's endocannabinoid system rather than against it. The philosophy is holistic: great skin starts with sleep, diet, stress management and movement — products are a complement, not a replacement. All formulas are vegan, cruelty-free and manufactured in Sweden.

- Website: https://www.1753skin.com
- Previous domain: https://www.1753skincare.com (permanently redirects to this site)
- Swedish site: https://www.1753skin.com/sv
- English site: https://www.1753skin.com/en
- Spanish site: https://www.1753skin.com/es
- German site: https://www.1753skin.com/de
- French site: https://www.1753skin.com/fr
- Contact: info@1753skin.com
- Country: Sweden
- Currency: SEK (Swedish site), EUR (international)
- Free shipping: orders over 700 SEK / 60 EUR

## Products (complete list)

### DUO kit + TA-DA Serum (Best value bundle)
- Price: 1 495 SEK / 129 EUR (normally 2 197 SEK / 189 EUR)
- What: Complete routine — The ONE Facial Oil (morning), I LOVE Facial Oil (evening), TA-DA Serum (booster)
- Key ingredients: 10% CBD, 0.2–5% CBG, organic jojoba oil
- URL: https://www.1753skin.com/sv/produkter/duo-ta-da

### DUO kit
- Price: 1 099 SEK / 95 EUR (normally 1 498 SEK / 129 EUR)
- What: Two facial oils — The ONE for morning (10% CBD, 0.2% CBG) and I LOVE for evening (10% CBD, 5% CBG)
- Size: 2 × 10 ml glass bottles with dropper
- URL: https://www.1753skin.com/sv/produkter/duo-kit

### TA-DA Serum
- Price: 699 SEK / 59 EUR
- What: CBG-enriched serum that seals in moisture and adds glow
- Key ingredients: 3% CBG (1 500 mg) in organic jojoba oil
- Size: 30 ml
- URL: https://www.1753skin.com/sv/produkter/ta-da-serum

### Au Naturel Makeup Remover
- Price: 399 SEK / 34 EUR
- What: Cleansing oil that removes makeup without disrupting the skin's microbiome
- Key ingredients: MCT oil, 0.2% CBD
- Size: 100 ml
- URL: https://www.1753skin.com/sv/produkter/au-naturel-makeup-remover

### Fungtastic Mushroom Extract
- Price: 377 SEK / 32 EUR
- What: Supplement with four medicinal mushrooms for immunity, focus, energy and sleep
- Key ingredients: Chaga, Lion's Mane, Cordyceps, Reishi (25% each, 15:1 extract, min 20% beta-glucans)
- Size: 60 capsules
- URL: https://www.1753skin.com/sv/produkter/fungtastic-mushroom-extract

## Services

### Free AI Skin Analysis
- What: Upload a photo and receive a personalised skin analysis powered by AI, including lifestyle recommendations and product suggestions
- Technology: MediaPipe (478 facial landmarks) + ONNX (88 000+ images, 9 conditions) + GPT-5.4 Vision
- 15 metrics, biological skin age, Fitzpatrick type, 12 facial zones
- 100% client-side image processing (privacy-first)
- URL (Swedish): https://www.1753skin.com/sv/gratis-hudanalys
- URL (English): https://www.1753skin.com/en/free-skin-analysis

## Key Differentiators

- CBD and CBG at clinically relevant concentrations (not trace amounts)
- Works with the endocannabinoid system — the body's own balancing mechanism
- Holistic approach: lifestyle first, products second
- Minimal ingredient lists — no fillers, fragrances or unnecessary additives
- Swedish-made, vegan, cruelty-free
- Subscription option with automatic delivery (10% discount, free shipping)
- Free AI skin analysis with industry-leading technical depth
- 30-day free return policy

## Content library (1 000+ SEO guide articles in 5 languages)

The guide library covers the following topic categories. Each guide is available in Swedish, English, Spanish, German and French, with hreflang alternates, JSON-LD BlogPosting + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList, Wikidata entity linking and peer-reviewed citations.

- Ingredients (CBD, CBG, jojoba, MCT, botanicals) – how each works on the skin
- Symptoms (acne, eczema, redness, dryness, sensitivity, barrier damage) – root causes and holistic fixes
- Body parts (face, neck, chest, back, scalp, hands) – location-specific concerns
- Life stages (teen, 20s, 30s, 40s, menopause, postpartum)
- Lifestyle & wellness (sleep, stress, gut–skin axis, nutrition, exercise)
- Seasonal skincare (winter barrier, summer, dry indoor air)
- Occupations (nurses, chefs, office, outdoor work)
- City-specific guides (Stockholm, Gothenburg, Malmö + major EU cities) – pollution + climate context
- Comparisons (CBD vs CBG, facial oil vs cream, etc.)
- Trends & myths (what actually holds up scientifically)
- Science deep-dives (endocannabinoid system, skin microbiome, barrier biology)
- How-to routines (morning, evening, oil-cleansing, travel)

Human-readable A–Z index: https://www.1753skin.com/sv/guide/alla
Structured one-sentence index per guide: https://www.1753skin.com/llms-guides.txt
RSS feed of all guides: https://www.1753skin.com/guide/rss.xml
